code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    b = x
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    i = i + 1
  else
    mut sign = 1
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut has = false
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(x)
          c = x
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          has = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end
    if has
      let signed = val * sign
      if signed % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + signed
      end
    end
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
